generatedFor: AlphaVest WealthOS V3 journey screencast automation

journeys.name: Signal To Advisor Approval Without Client Visibility
journeys.endState: Advisor review is visible; client visibility remains blocked until compliance release.
preconditions: Signal, trigger and approval package demo data exist
visibilityRules: Signal and analyst workbench states are internal-only
Advisor approval does not release to client
complianceRules: Compliance release remains required after advisor approval
evidenceExpectations: Analyst routing note and advisor approval should create evidence in later workflow phases
auditExpectations: Signal open, request-data, route, advisor approval and escalation actions are audited by the demo workflow API
riskNotes: Client release remains blocked after advisor approval
Database mutations are demo-scoped and backed by seeded fixture records

steps.action: Set role and inspect signal queue
steps.expectedStateChange: Seeded trigger remains internal-only before the analyst action.
steps.qaAssertion: Signal page renders with no client advice copy.
steps.title: Signal Review: Set role and inspect signal queue
steps.caption: We review the signal before the client sees anything. That gives the team time to check the risk and decide what needs human review.

steps.expectedStateChange: Request-data state is saved and the analyst lands in the workbench.
steps.qaAssertion: Clicking Request Data reaches the workbench without client release.
steps.title: Signal Review: Click request information path if exposed
steps.caption: The team asks for missing information before the work moves forward. This keeps weak or incomplete advice away from the client.

steps.action: Continue into readiness checklist after request-data action
steps.expectedStateChange: Analyst workbench shows internal publish readiness after the click-through.
steps.qaAssertion: Publish to Client remains unavailable as a completed release.
steps.title: Consultant Workbench: Inspect readiness checklist
steps.caption: The workbench shows what is missing and what is ready. This keeps the package internal until the review path is clear.

steps.expectedStateChange: Trigger is routed to advisor review and the advisor queue opens.
steps.qaAssertion: Routing moves to advisor review while the package remains internal.
steps.title: Trigger Detail: Click route or reassignment control if exposed
steps.caption: The workbench shows what is missing and what is ready. This keeps the package internal until the review path is clear.

steps.action: Continue into advisor queue after routing
steps.expectedStateChange: Advisor queue is reached by the previous routing action.
steps.qaAssertion: Queue shows pending review after the route transition.
steps.title: Advisor Approval Queue: Set advisor role and inspect queue
steps.caption: The advisor reviews the package here, but this is still internal. The client cannot see it until compliance releases it.

steps.expectedStateChange: Advisor approval is saved, but compliance release is still required.
steps.qaAssertion: Advisor approval writes demo state without client visibility.
steps.title: Advisor Approval Detail: Click Approve
steps.caption: The advisor approves the package here, but this is still internal. The client cannot see it until compliance releases it.

steps.action: Click Escalate to Call as the non-release alternative
steps.expectedStateChange: Escalation is saved and the client-side negative check opens.
steps.qaAssertion: Escalation creates no client release and routes to the decision negative check.
steps.title: Advisor Approval Detail: Inspect or click Escalate to Call
steps.caption: The advisor escalates instead of releasing the package. That keeps the next step human and controlled when more discussion is needed.

inputData: Negative check after advisor approval only
steps.action: Continue to client decision negative check
steps.expectedStateChange: Advisor-only package is not exposed as a released client decision.
steps.qaAssertion: Advisor approval alone does not show a released client decision.
steps.title: Decision List: Switch to client role and inspect decisions
steps.caption: The client reviews a released decision here. The evidence trail shows why the decision is ready to act on.
dataRefs: Negative check after advisor approval only

journeys.name: Compliance Release Or Block
journeys.endState: Release confirmation is shown or blocked state remains client-invisible.
visibilityRules: Released content may become client-visible only after gates pass
complianceRules: Evidence, advisor approval, compliance release and permission checks are required
auditExpectations: Release, block, evidence request and audit export are sensitive/audited
riskNotes: Release is visual/demo until workflow lifecycle persistence exists

steps.title: Compliance Queue: Set role and inspect queue
steps.caption: Compliance checks the proof before client release. If something is missing, the package stays blocked instead of becoming unchecked advice.

steps.qaAssertion: Release gates not satisfied state is visible.
steps.title: Compliance Review Detail: Inspect evidence checklist
steps.caption: Compliance checks the proof before client release. If something is missing, the package stays blocked instead of becoming unchecked advice.

steps.qaAssertion: Request-evidence path is available before release.
steps.title: Compliance Review Detail: Click Request Evidence
steps.caption: The team asks for missing information before the work moves forward. This keeps weak or incomplete advice away from the client.

steps.title: Compliance Review Detail: Click Block
steps.caption: Compliance blocks the package because proof is missing or risk is too high. That protects the client from unchecked advice.

steps.qaAssertion: Blocked status and evidence list render.
steps.title: Block Or Request Evidence: Click Request Evidence
steps.caption: The team asks for missing information before the work moves forward. This keeps weak or incomplete advice away from the client.

steps.title: Release To Client: Click Release to client
steps.caption: Compliance releases the package only after the checks are satisfied. This is the step that can make approved content client-visible.

steps.title: Audit Exception Log: Inspect audit table
steps.caption: Compliance checks the proof before client release. If something is missing, the package stays blocked instead of becoming unchecked advice.

steps.action: Switch to client role and inspect decisions
steps.qaAssertion: Blocked review never appears as client decision.
steps.title: Decision List: Switch to client role and inspect decisions
steps.caption: The client reviews a released decision here. The evidence trail shows why the decision is ready to act on.

journeys.name: Document Upload And Verification
journeys.endState: Document is under human review with evidence placeholders.
visibilityRules: Client sees upload and verification states, not internal analyst notes
complianceRules: AI extraction is draft; sensitive documents may require specialist or compliance review

journeys.name: Platform Policy And No-Advice Baseline
journeys.endState: Policies, templates and sensitive confirmations are visible without releasing client advice.
